name: Unit4 Access Point REST API
description: REST API for the Unit4 Access Point PEPPOL service enabling organizations to send and receive electronic business documents (invoices, orders) over the PEPPOL network. Uses Basic Authentication over HTTPS with XML payloads.

potentialAction.name: Send Document via Outbox
potentialAction.description: Submit business documents (invoices, orders) for PEPPOL network transmission using multipart/form-data POST to /outbox.

potentialAction.name: Retrieve Outbox Status
potentialAction.description: Retrieve status of outbound messages submitted to the PEPPOL network.

potentialAction.name: Receive Inbox Messages
potentialAction.description: List and retrieve unread inbound PEPPOL messages received from trading partners.

potentialAction.name: Mark Messages Read
potentialAction.description: Mark received inbox messages as read after processing.

potentialAction.name: Search Messages
potentialAction.description: Search all sent and received messages with filtering by timestamp, sender, receiver, and direction.

potentialAction.name: PEPPOL Directory Lookup
potentialAction.description: Look up recipient PEPPOL network connectivity and supported document types.

potentialAction.name: Usage Statistics
potentialAction.description: Monitor account usage statistics for the Access Point service.
